title: Build a website for AI pics for dating apps in 20 hours, launched ads, failed
excerpt: Build a website for AI pics for dating apps in 20 hours, launched ads, failed
content_html:
Build a website for AI pics for dating apps in 20 hours, launched ads, failed

I had some free google cloud credits (included nano banana for AI gen photos) Build a simple website - user uploads a selfie, receiving cool pics for dating apps with his face + he can edit photos with promts. 3 photos with watermarks for free, after that pack with 25 photos for 9,99$, In the backend its prefiltered cool photos + face recognition in order to return only photos with a good simularity.

End result - $202 spent, funnel - 123 clicks (8,0% CTR, $1,64 per click) 37 made free photos, 2 purchases

I want to try Meta Ads as well, I like the idea that you could check meta ads library for competitor's creatives (video and pics) and copy those which are running for a long time. Nobody will run a creative for a long time if it doesnt have a good ROI. I want to try this

Expirience from this project - it seems like its not that diffucult now a days to launche google ads via google ads API and claude, I had pretty good metrics (CTR and cost per click). The question is how to achive good conversion ration on the website

sentences.zh: 20小时内为约会应用建立一个AI图片网站，推出广告，失败

blocks.html_en: I had some free google cloud credits (included nano banana for AI gen photos) Build a simple website - user uploads a selfie, receiving cool pics for dating apps with his face + he can edit photos with promts. 3 photos with watermarks for free, after that pack with 25 photos for 9,99$, In the backend its prefiltered cool photos + face recognition in order to return only photos with a good simularity.

sentences.en: I had some free google cloud credits (included nano banana for AI gen photos) Build a simple website - user uploads a selfie, receiving cool pics for dating apps with his face + he can edit photos with promts.
sentences.zh: 我有一些免费的谷歌云积分（包括用于人工智能生成照片的纳米香蕉）构建一个简单的网站 - 用户上传一张自拍照，接收带有他的脸的约会应用程序的酷照片+他可以使用提示编辑照片。

sentences.en: 3 photos with watermarks for free, after that pack with 25 photos for 9,99$, In the backend its prefiltered cool photos + face recognition in order to return only photos with a good simularity.
sentences.zh: 3 张带水印的照片免费，之后包含 25 张照片，价格为 9,99 美元，在后端预过滤的酷照片 + 人脸识别，以便只返回具有良好相似度的照片。

blocks.html_en: End result - $202 spent, funnel - 123 clicks (8,0% CTR, $1,64 per click) 37 made free photos, 2 purchases

sentences.zh: 最终结果 - 花费 202 美元，漏斗 - 123 次点击（点击率 8.0%，每次点击 1.64 美元） 37 张免费照片，2 次购买

sentences.en: I want to try Meta Ads as well, I like the idea that you could check meta ads library for competitor's creatives (video and pics) and copy those which are running for a long time.
sentences.zh: 我也想尝试元广告，我喜欢这样的想法：您可以检查元广告库中竞争对手的创意（视频和图片）并复制那些运行很长时间的创意。

sentences.en: Nobody will run a creative for a long time if it doesnt have a good ROI.
sentences.zh: 如果没有良好的投资回报率，没有人会长期运行广告素材。

blocks.html_en: Expirience from this project - it seems like its not that diffucult now a days to launche google ads via google ads API and claude, I had pretty good metrics (CTR and cost per click). The question is how to achive good conversion ration on the website

sentences.en: Expirience from this project - it seems like its not that diffucult now a days to launche google ads via google ads API and claude, I had pretty good metrics (CTR and cost per click).
sentences.zh: 这个项目的经验 - 现在通过谷歌广告 API 和克劳德启动谷歌广告似乎并不困难，我有很好的指标（点击率和每次点击费用）。

sentences.en: The question is how to achive good conversion ration on the website
sentences.zh: 问题是如何在网站上获得良好的转化率

content_html_zh:
20小时内为约会应用建立一个AI图片网站，推出广告，失败

我有一些免费的谷歌云积分（包括用于人工智能生成照片的纳米香蕉）构建一个简单的网站 - 用户上传一张自拍照，接收带有他的脸的约会应用程序的酷照片+他可以使用提示编辑照片。 3 张带水印的照片免费，之后包含 25 张照片，价格为 9,99 美元，在后端预过滤的酷照片 + 人脸识别，以便只返回具有良好相似度的照片。

最终结果 - 花费 202 美元，漏斗 - 123 次点击（点击率 8.0%，每次点击 1.64 美元） 37 张免费照片，2 次购买

我也想尝试元广告，我喜欢这样的想法：您可以检查元广告库中竞争对手的创意（视频和图片）并复制那些运行很长时间的创意。 如果没有良好的投资回报率，没有人会长期运行广告素材。 我想尝试这个

这个项目的经验 - 现在通过谷歌广告 API 和克劳德启动谷歌广告似乎并不困难，我有很好的指标（点击率和每次点击费用）。 问题是如何在网站上获得良好的转化率
